Gesture-Powered Rock Paper Scissors

🤜🤛

Ready to Duel?

Use your Mudra Band to play Rock Paper Scissors with real gestures. Calibrate 3 gestures, train a model with sklearn, then battle the AI.

✊
Rock
Beats Scissors
✋
Paper
Beats Rock
✌
Scissors
Beats Paper

    How to Play

    With Mudra Band:

    1. Connect your Mudra Band
    2. Click "Start Calibration"
    3. Record 3-5 samples per gesture (Rock, Paper, Scissors)
    4. Model trains automatically after all gestures
    5. Validate, then play!

    Demo Mode:

    1. Click "Quick Play (Demo)"
    2. During detection: R=Rock, P=Paper, S=Scissors

    Keyboard:

    • Space — Record gesture during calibration
    • Enter — Next round
    • ? — Show this help

    Calibration Presets
